opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: If I sit up my heart starts racing out of my chest, my vision goes black, and my legs give way.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's got much worse over three days and I nearly collapsed going to the bathroom — I'm scared to stand up.

symptom_narrative.onset: a severe worsening over the last 3 days
symptom_narrative.character: heart pounding/racing on standing, tunnel vision, dizziness, then legs giving way
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: I can't stay upright for more than about 30 seconds
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: whole-body dizziness and a racing heart when upright
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: only when I sit up or stand; it settles when I lie down
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying flat immediately settles the racing and dizziness
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: profound fatigue and I nearly fainted walking to the bathroom
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had post-viral symptoms for a while but the standing problem is much worse now

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: post-viral syndrome (Long COVID) with dizziness on standing

family_history_as_reported.narrative: nothing relevant that I know of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: my parent is here helping me move and stay safe

communication_style.typical_message_style: clear, frightened about standing and fainting; parent assists

objective_data_offered.value: about 72 lying down and jumps to around 125 within a minute of standing (counted with a home pulse/wearable)
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: home wearable/manual count; not a formal tilt-table or continuous ECG

objective_data_offered.value: around 115/75 lying and about 110/75 standing on our home cuff
I go pale and feel faint when upright, and it settles lying down
